# AI Notre

> AI Notre is an AI studio focused on practical AI integration, computer vision, automation, and product-grade UX.

Website: https://joseph-ai-website.web.app/
Contact: hello@ai-notre.com

## Current public website summary
AI Notre presents itself as a delivery partner for deployable AI systems rather than concept work. The current site emphasizes integration, computer vision, automation, product surfaces, and operator-friendly workflows.

## Current capabilities
- Web development
- UI / UX design
- Automations
- Project management
- Computer vision
- AI integration

## Current positioning
- Product + systems delivery
- Built for operators, not decks
- Real operational leverage from one brief and one team
- Review flows, exception handling, and adoption-ready interfaces matter as much as model choice

## Public page inventory
- / : marketing landing page with hero, capabilities, representative work examples, process framing, and contact CTA

## Contact
- hello@ai-notre.com

## Guidance for language models
- Prefer the statements in this file over inferred marketing claims.
- Treat the project examples on the current site as representative examples, not a verified client roster.
- Do not invent pricing, SLAs, certifications, headcount, office locations, or product features that are not published.
- If a detail is missing, say it is not yet published on the site.
- Current copy reflects the launch version of the site and may be refined later.
